{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231531441BC007AD1FE2044A96EB"}"},"total":66},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612289530583630654","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开篇不错情节紧凑值得一看的好书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772376199,"group_id":"7570992404623281177","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5AvgZMuOSqUogIe16ywAhA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"53254127561","user_name":"爱吃熊猫饭饭的秦元"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53254127561","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570992404623281177","book_info":{"abstract":"21世纪社畜徐望川一睁眼，竟穿越到1934年的南京，成了复兴社特务处最底层的档案管理员。面对同事口中血淋淋的行动，他只想把这份枯燥工作当成“新手保护期”，苟活于乱世。然而，当他从一份“无异常”的卷宗里，嗅出了通天阴谋时，他知道，想活命，就必须向上爬！
凭借超越时代的思维，他将三条不相干的情报串联，瞬间锁定一名伪装成饭店老板的日本间谍！质疑定论，等于自寻死路，背后要么是同僚无能，要么是内鬼作祟。为了抓住唯一的晋升阶梯，他绕开所有程序，孤注一掷向黄埔师兄、行动组长沈怀远汇报。面对轻蔑与质疑，他抛出颠覆性的调查方案：不盯人，去查饭店的垃圾！
从幕后分析到一线行动，他在枪林弹雨的血色洗礼中，亲手击毙潜伏特工，吐得翻江倒海，却也彻底蜕变！当所有人都以为这个“白面书生”只是运气好时，他却用一场“请君入瓮”的完美设计，将政敌送上绝路，为戴笠献上投名状。他冷酷、贪婪，却又慷慨分金，将一群亡命之徒收为心腹，打造属于自己的铁血班底！
戴笠：“我只要结果！”徐恩曾：“必杀此獠！”师兄沈怀远：“你小子天生就是吃这碗饭的料！”
当一张笼罩南京的日本间谍巨网缓缓拉开，代号“鼹鼠”的幽灵浮出水面，真正的猎杀，才刚刚开始！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/79c30b4c7527e3c46c450df192efe04d","author":"刷牙吧小姐","author_id":"","book_id":"7570992404623281177","book_name":"谍战：让你卧底，你成幕后黑手","book_short_name":"重回1935，我成了戴笠的王牌","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":507,"name":"谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507&name=谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573732937028338200","read_count":"16709","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"843019"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"348","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,特工,谍战,魂穿,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c641ed3adeb5835d8d0b9e064602751f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435104&x-signature=FUz66igcuCzpBfl8Zz4ySeKgeCw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3844371122230883","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231531441BC007AD1FE2044A96EB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{
